meta.title: The Future of Venezuela: A Conversation with Special Representative Elliott Abrams
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a conversation with Special Representative for Venezuela Elliott Abrams and Hudson Senior Fellow Heather Nauert as they discuss the Trump administration’s proposed Democratic Transition Framework for peace and stability in Venezuela.
